experiment: l3a-parse blind EVAL input build (EVAL-BUILD-SPEC step 5) — recoverability-audit freeze block, adjudicated together with the a5-nl lint freeze block from the same build
candidate: nl-boundary line (l3a-parse / a5-nl): is the frozen closed query grammar reachable from blind held-out natural-language phrasings by a deterministic training-free front-end, without breaking the fail-closed contract?
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 interpretive record. SCOPE: both records are DRAFT (never frozen); the blind EVAL corpora are committed at b4a21fc; no scored arm has run; nothing here is a verdict and no verdict-grade claim is made. This record adjudicates two freeze-blocking INSTRUMENT-side findings surfaced by the runner's mechanical build report, interprets what the first one establishes, and registers the pre-freeze design iteration (ASM-0420..0425, design doc section 14) that the coordinator implements before the independent skeptic re-attack and prereg-freeze.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the Fable/Opus execution split: the Opus runner executed the blind EVAL build mechanically (packets, fresh-identity authoring, lints, recoverability audit) and reported raw findings without interpreting them; what the numbers MEAN — genuine finding vs design artifact, the epistemic status, the re-scope, and the lawful a5 remedy — is decided here and only here. This record interprets; it does not run, author, grade, or audit, and it commits the maintainer to nothing.

mechanical_facts.audit_artifact: data/nlb-phrasings-l3a/audit-recoverability.json sha256 d6365bd95e7d61a1cce7585bb446aa8f905b2b8eec08d0756a446e2e70a09bf5 (judge transcript sha256 7f3f2291a7e46fb554e7477fc92ff3611d4a0131e117aa5c027960563f36fb1a); corpus committed at b4a21fc, eval.jsonl sha256 832828d892260ee53aff51d648998e3656a2d5dc16b26c55713b638964858d8a; l3a lint receipt GREEN (sha256 dc33052b927f79495ae621d6adecb0ec01ddb1b055b19611c10cd0cc76b8dea3)
mechanical_facts.shape_entity_upper_bound: 52/60 = 0.8667 < 0.95 even with rel-label matching ignored entirely [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1]
mechanical_facts.genuine_shape_failures: 8/8 concentrated in exactly three families: unique-maker 3 (of 4 sampled), made-lookup 4 (of 4 sampled), out-of-scope-rel 1 (a control). ZERO shape failures in the other 13 sampled families (27/27 sampled in-scope covered items shape+entity-correct, recomputed from the committed audit + the deterministic EVAL-BUILD-SPEC step-5 sample rule) [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1]
mechanical_facts.rel_synonym_only_misses: 9/60: judge recovered shape+entity but named the relation with a non-stem-overlapping surface form taken from the phrasing (create for maker-of x4, comprise for has-part x4, male for man x1) — i.e. the phrasing itself uses a natural synonym, not the lexicon label [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1]

finding_1_l3a_recoverability.adjudication: GENUINE FINDING (option a), with one bounded scorer-side artifact riding on it. The 8 shape failures are not an authoring defect and not a judge defect: English unmarked wh-questions are number-neutral (who/what does not mark one-vs-all), and for agentive noun relations (maker of) they are orientation-flexible (What did X make? / Who made X? — the packet gloss cannot force the surface form without dictating it). The kot-query/1 distinctions unique-vs-lookup (op cardinality) and role-vs-flip (orientation) for NON-FUNCTIONAL relations are therefore not injectively recoverable from faithful natural phrasings. For functional relations the world-knowledge default carries the distinction: unique-father/unique-mother sampled items recovered without a single shape miss. The 9 rel-synonym misses are the separate, bounded artifact: the audit match rule's stem-overlap operationalisation of 'label up to inflection' fails legitimate natural synonym use that FK-NLB-8 explicitly permits authors — but this artifact CANNOT explain the block (the shape+entity ceiling 0.8667 already fails the gate with rel matching ignored). The runner's 'not a scorer artifact' reading is CONFIRMED for the load-bearing 8; the rel-label leg of the gate is the one component reclassified as scorer-side (ASM-0421).

what_it_establishes.measured_instrument_level: Under this blind protocol (one judge identity, n=60 deterministic sample, agent-authored K=1 phrasings), round-trip shape recovery fails for the unique-maker and made-lookup strata while succeeding for all other covered strata. The freeze gate did exactly its registered job: it blocked an instrument on which a FAIL (or a kill) could be manufactured by phrasing-shape underdetermination rather than parser inadequacy. [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1cce7585bb446aa8f905b2b8eec08d0756a446e2e70a09bf5]
what_it_establishes.correctness_thesis_bearing: A MEASURED PARTIAL-NEGATIVE on NL-boundary reachability, at instrument level: the micro-second checker's closed query surface is only PARTIALLY reachable from unmarked natural language. The reachable region (measured clean here) = shapes whose semantics English marks or world-knowledge defaults: functional-unique (mother/father), count (how many), is-a, and set-valued lookups with marked or default-safe readings. The unreachable-in-form region = the unique/lookup cardinality split and role orientation on non-functional relations: the information is ABSENT FROM THE NL SIGNAL, so no parser investment (deterministic or LLM) can recover it item-wise; a front-end can only default (the pinned frame's fail-closed lookup default is the correct engineering response) or demand marked query English. This is a datum about the NL boundary itself, not about this parser build.
what_it_establishes.epistemic_status_of_the_irreducibility_r: The 'irreducibly lossy' formulation is the designer's interpretation of the measured failure pattern plus a linguistic regularity (number-neutrality of English wh-questions); it is NOT itself a measured quantity and is NOT registered as one. Bounds: one judge, one authoring protocol, agent identities sharing training distribution, K=1, two self-authored verticals, English only. What IS measured: the 8/8 concentration and the 0.8667 ceiling. The interpretation is falsifiable by a successor showing blind judges recovering these shapes from natural unmarked phrasings at gate rate — no such successor is required for this line to proceed.
what_it_establishes.not_established: NOT a global negative (NL cannot reach the checker) — 27/27 sampled in-scope covered items recovered shape+entity. NOT a statement about natural-user distributions, other languages, or LLM parsers' end-task accuracy. NOT a verdict-grade claim: no scored arm has run.

finding_1_l3a_recoverability.s2_manufactured_kill_hazard: Registered consequence that the audit block preempted: by the pinned S2 definition (status=answer AND value != expected), a faithful unmarked unique-maker phrasing that the pinned frame fail-closed-defaults to lookup would return a singleton LIST against a SCALAR gold and score as a DANGEROUS wrong answer despite being semantically correct. With 43 unique-maker items against the S2 kill threshold (fires from 18/600), an un-re-scoped run could have fired the fail-closed kill from a shape-representation mismatch, indicting the parser for information the phrasings never carried. The recoverability gate blocking freeze BEFORE this could fire is the instrument-side system working as designed.
finding_1_l3a_recoverability.rescope_decision: l3a-parse RE-SCOPES to the shape-recoverable covered set: drop unique-maker (43) and made-lookup (30) from the SCORED covered set; primary/S2 denominators become n=527 over 7 families; the corpus, packets, phrasings, front-end, instrument and G2 ceiling arm stay byte-identical (scope applied in the pinned analysis script only). The dropped strata remain in the run and are reported DESCRIPTIVELY as a quarantined shape-ambiguous stratum — the finding stands as evidence; the instrument stops gating on it. Registered as fork FK-NLB-10 [STIPULATED: ASM-0420]; audit gate split shape+entity-gated / rel-label-descriptive [STIPULATED: ASM-0421]; audit extension without judge re-roll [STIPULATED: ASM-0422]; post-data scorer-side edit lawfulness boundary [STIPULATED: ASM-0424]. Full mechanics + recomputed decidability table: design doc section 14 (docs/design-nl-boundary-l3a-parse-a5-nl.md).
finding_1_l3a_recoverability.sizing_honesty_note: The audit sample also measured natural synonym phrasing on in-scope covered items: 9/27 = 0.333 (concentrated: count-maker 4/4 sampled, part-lookup 4/4 sampled, instance-true 1/4) [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1]. Against a single-label mapper lexicon this makes the 0.95 primary planning value implausible and an INCONCLUSIVE-to-FAIL landing live (ASM-0425, EXTRAPOLATION, load-bearing for NOTHING — sizing/expectation only). This is the experiment working, not a defect: a FAIL routes to parser investment (synonym/alias layer) per the frozen kill text, never GPU. The re-scope deliberately does NOT rescue the primary from the synonym penalty — synonym-phrased items stay scored.

finding_2_a5_lint.mechanical_facts: a5 lint receipt RED, sha256 da8c693da230f8dd6fdc75917ccbd40a476fcb28bddc5076ef477e64fda9acc8: 28 EVAL-NO-ANSWER + 1 EVAL-DIVERSITY (instance-true dominant template 111/216). The 28 verified 28/28 structural by the masked-entity predicate (recomputed 2026-07-10 against a5-eval queries + eval.jsonl sha256 074b686cb5b0d8227c21f966f7c935e18fab002eb5d245033558e2321a5f1ba8): every leaked answer surface occurs ONLY inside the phrasing's mandatory verbatim entity identifier, and each leaked answer is a substring of (or equal to) that identifier — nested-function name prefixes (where-defined 9, contained-in 9) and self-recursive call edges (callers-of 5, callees-of 5). The identifier is the entity's ONLY name (ASM-0142), so the leak is unavoidable by any faithful phrasing: structural, not an authoring defect. [MEASURED: da8c693da230f8dd]
finding_2_a5_lint.adjudication: DESIGN ARTIFACT of the lint rule, remedied by the NARROW EXEMPTION, not by dropping items. Chosen remedy: FK-NLB-11 [STIPULATED: ASM-0423] — EVAL-NO-ANSWER exempts a leak iff, after masking all occurrences of the item's entity surfaces (longest-first), no answer surface remains in the phrasing; exempted qids are DISCLOSED in a new receipt field (waived_forced_substring), never silently. Rejected: (i) dropping the 28 — they are NL-faithful and answerable, and they are systematically the ONLY items covering nested-definition and self-recursion semantics; dropping them would let a hygiene rule aimed at surface-reading arms delete a real semantic slice from an instrument no current arm can exploit (the deterministic pipeline extracts no answers from surfaces; the answer-all fabrication policy is surface-blind); (ii) accept-as-disclosed with a RED receipt — G3 gates on green; a permanently red gate is a dead gate. MANDATORY REUSE CAVEAT registered with the exemption: any successor with a model-based arm (a5-llm re-freeze) MUST exclude or re-phrase the waived qids — an LLM can read the answer off the question; the caveat rides in the a5-nl record's successors field and in ASM-0423. The EVAL-DIVERSITY finding needs NO decision: EVAL-BUILD-SPEC step 4 already prescribes fresh-identity re-authoring of the affected family; the coordinator executes it as written.

maintainer_flags: FLAG 1 (decision made, veto point open): the l3a re-scope + audit-gate split is a POST-DATA instrument redefinition on the same data that blocked the freeze. It is within designer authority on DRAFT records (prereg-freeze has not run; the claim only SHRINKS; the direction is conservative), but the maintainer can veto at freeze, and the independent skeptic re-attack (design doc section 11 item 6) is EXPLICITLY tasked to attack ASM-0420..0424 as forking-paths moves before prereg-freeze.

FLAG 2 (expectation-setting): the measured 0.333 in-sample synonym-phrasing rate makes an l3a-parse INCONCLUSIVE/FAIL landing live (ASM-0425). No re-design is proposed or permitted to avoid it; flagged so the freeze decision is made knowing the primary is at genuine risk — that is the value of running it.

FLAG 3 (evidence, no permission sought): finding 1 is the programme's first measured partial-negative touching correctness-thesis territory (NL-boundary reachability). It should surface in the next feasibility synthesis with the epistemic bounds stated in this record.

ordering: 1. Coordinator lands the section-14 design iteration: analysis/l3a_parse.py scope + new descriptive fields; nlb_lint.py masked forced-substring exemption + waived-qid receipt field; re-pin both shas in BOTH DRAFT records; record edits per design doc 14.6 (l3a n_scored 527, excluded shape-ambiguous strata; a5 successors reuse caveat). Front-end files and phrasing corpora BYTE-UNTOUCHED (ASM-0424 invariant).

2. l3a audit r1: mechanical re-score of the COMMITTED judge transcript on in-scope covered sampled items (27/27 shape+entity) + extension to n=60 with FRESH judge identity on NEW in-scope items only (no re-roll, ASM-0422); gate shape+entity >= 57/60; rel-label + control recovery descriptive. Artifact audit-recoverability-r1.json; the original audit stays committed as the driving evidence.

3. a5: re-lint under the exempting rule (expect green + waived_forced_substring list, 28 qids); fresh-identity re-authoring of instance-true per EVAL-BUILD-SPEC step 4 (diversity finding); re-lint; THEN the a5 recoverability audit (step 5) under the ASM-0421 split gate — for a5 the corrected gate is genuinely pre-data. l3a lint re-run under the new lint must stay green with an EMPTY waived list.
4. Corpus pins (step 6) into both records; EXPECTED_PHRASINGS_SHA256 set; mock + selftest smoke (step 7).

5. Independent non-designer skeptic re-attack on the BUILT inputs INCLUDING the post-data edits and ASM-0420..0425 (item 6). 6. prereg-freeze (item 7). 7. Opus runs; Codex cross-vendor audit on any computed PASS.
freeze_path.a5_audit_expectation: The a5 op vocabulary maps to distinct English frames (who calls X / what does X call / where is X defined / what does X contain vs what contains X); converse pairs are direction-marked in English and where-defined is functional — the l3a cardinality trap has no a5 analog on covered strata. Stated as designer expectation for planning only; the a5 audit MEASURES it and gates as normal.
